---
name: Skill Enhancement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing skill
title: "[Enhancement] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ''
---

## Skill

<!-- Skill name, e.g., "data-mapping" -->

## Proposed Change

<!-- What would you like to change or add? Be specific about which section(s) of the SKILL.md
are affected: process steps, output format, jurisdiction notes, etc. -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why is this change valuable? Include any of:
- User feedback or pain points observed
- Regulatory changes that make this relevant
- Gaps in coverage compared to existing tools/frameworks -->

## Regulatory Basis (if applicable)

<!-- If this enhancement adds jurisdiction-specific guidance, cite the regulatory source
with article/section numbers. -->

## Backward Compatibility

<!-- Does this change affect the skill's output format? If yes, would downstream skills
(those that consume this skill's output) need updates? -->

- [ ] No output format changes — patch version bump
- [ ] New output fields added (backward compatible) — minor version bump
- [ ] Output format changed (breaking) — major version bump

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other information, examples, or references. -->
